calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Removing Christine Witherspoon As Trustee; Appointing Leo F. Bautista As Successor Trustee; And Waiving Bond
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lachona for Leo Bautista (Petitioner/Proposed Successor Trustee).

Mr. Lachona stated that there is no objection to the petition, that he reached out to previous Counsel for Ms. Witherspoon, and that there is no word from Ms. Witherspoon or the Beneficiaries. The Court granted the Petition for Order Removing Christine Witherspoon as Trustee, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Removing Christine Witherspoon As Trustee; Appointing Leo F. Bautista As Successor Trustee; And Waiving Bond
